audit: BAU list grouped — inline-edit popover regression — P1 follow-up
root_cause: useEpicBacklog SELECT included comment_count, which does not exist on ph_issues. PostgREST returned 400 (PG error 42703 'column ph_issues.comment_count does not exist'). React Query treated epics as []. parentOptions.map then produced [], so the Parent popover only rendered the 'No parent' sentinel + 'No matches' empty state.

supabase_evidence.stories_already_omit_comment_count: useStoryBacklog (line 195) does not select comment_count and works fine — this fix puts epics on the same footing

table_row_count_delta.explanation: Three additional rows now render — these are the synthesized epic-level rows in BacklogPage's tree merge that previously couldn't surface because epics was [] (BacklogPage only synthesizes rows for epics that the merge identifies via parent_key linkage). Stories whose parent_key matched an epic already rendered as nested children; now their epic parents also surface as their own group rows.
